message:
refactor(diary): Simplify diary module structure

Streamlines the diary module to essential functionality:

- Simplified imports to core dependencies only
- Reduced helper functions to focus on diary generation
- Maintains compatibility with extractDiary from llm.js
- Cleaner module interface
